payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is already remembered as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship should be remembered, or whether both are true in your family context.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter
New input: Sara is my niece

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to the same named person, Sara, but the stated relationship conflicts with the existing memory.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new statement conflicts with an existing relationship memory.

repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace it with: Sara is my niece.
Record both relationships if Sara is both your daughter and niece.
Mark the relationship as uncertain until clarified.
